# Brief

Topic: Evidence-first AI slide workflow
Audience: Operators building source-backed presentations
Deck length: 5 slides
Geography and time window: Global, current public documentation
Source policy: Prefer official documentation, public repositories, and government or research institution sources.
Excluded source types: Unsourced social posts and vendor claims without evidence.
Output language: English
Known assumptions: This is a public validation fixture.
Supplied source materials: None.
